emergency_definition: active roof leak causing interior water damage
major storm damage where structure is exposed
heavy interior flooding from roof breach
non_emergency_routing_rules: standard voicemail, responded next business day

call_transfer_rules.fail_action: apologize and confirm a callback within 90 minutes

integration_constraints: never create a job without a full property address and roof type
all storm damage jobs must have a photo attached before the job is created
insurance claim jobs must be tagged with the insurance carrier name in JobNimbus
never schedule a metal roof job without confirming we have a certified metal roofing technician available that week
after_hours_flow_summary: Non-emergency calls go to standard voicemail, responded next business day. Insurance claims inquiries are responded to within 24 hours.
office_hours_flow_summary: Calls are answered and routed according to emergency or non-emergency status, with emergency calls going to the storm response team lead.
special_instructions: always ask if the caller has an insurance claim open
ask about insurance earlier in the conversation
ask 'Were you referred to us by anyone?' at the end of every call
